inputs.label: Suction Static Head
inputs.businessContext: Elevation of fluid source surface relative to pump centerline (positive if source is above pump, negative if below).

businessContext_i18n.en: Elevation of fluid source surface relative to pump centerline (positive if source is above pump, negative if below).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Akışkan kaynağı yüzeyinin pompa merkez hattına göre kotu (kaynak pompanın üstündeyse pozitif, altındaysa negatif).

inputs.label: Discharge Static Head
inputs.businessContext: Elevation of discharge point relative to pump centerline.

businessContext_i18n.en: Elevation of discharge point relative to pump centerline.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Basma noktasının pompa merkez hattına göre kotu.

inputs.label: Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Volumetric flow rate of the fluid in liters per second.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volumetric flow rate of the fluid in liters per second.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Saniyede litre cinsinden akışkanın hacimsel debisi.

inputs.label: Pipe Length
inputs.businessContext: Total length of straight pipe between suction and discharge.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total length of straight pipe between suction and discharge.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emme ve basma arasındaki düz borunun toplam uzunluğu.

inputs.label: Hazen-Williams C-Factor
inputs.businessContext: Pipe roughness coefficient (e.g., 120 for steel, 150 for PVC).

businessContext_i18n.en: Pipe roughness coefficient (e.g., 120 for steel, 150 for PVC).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Boru pürüzlülük katsayısı (ör. çelik için 120, PVC için 150).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
